name: Broccoli and Avocado Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the broccoli into florets.
2. If the pieces are large, cut the stems in half.
3. Rinse and drain the broccoli.
4. Reserve the stems for another use.
5. Drop the broccoli into boiling salted water to cover.
6. Bring to a boil and cook 2 minutes.
7. Drain and run the broccoli briefly under cold water to cool.
8. Drain again and chill.
9. Cut the avocado in half, peel each half, and remove the pit.
10. Cut each half into 8 lengthwise strips.
11. Squeeze the lemon juice over the avocado strips to prevent discoloration.
12. Arrange the broccoli and avocado alternately on each of 4 serving plates.
13. Blend the mustard, garlic, vinegar, pepper, and oil in a bowl with a wire whisk, adding salt if needed.
14. Pour the dressing over the broccoli and avocado.
15. Serve immediately.
